feed.title: AO3 - Trans Tim Drake (DCU) (Filtered)

entry.title: to have, to hold
entry.summary:
Author: moon_will_sing

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,714Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 32

Summary: So yeah, his binder was fucking awesome. Usually. Less so when he’d been wearing it for what was nearing thirteen hours now, under an already pretty tight dress shirt, while attempting to socialize with stuffy rich people at this godforsaken gala.   Or: Tim is still struggling with reaching out when he needs help. His siblings are hell-bent on helping him get better at it, one hair-ruffle and hug at a time.

entry.title: If no one’s coming to save you, no one’s coming to stop you
entry.summary:
Author: artistic_aerialist

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,310Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 271

Summary: Tim would like to reiterate that his family's support for Damian gender identity was the bare minimum, except he absolutely refused for the the thought of Tim copying his (literal) backstabbing demon of a younger sibling to even cross the mind of anyone. He would not be announcing the fact that he, too, is transgender. If he came out to Bruce, the chances are Bruce would get him testosterone within the next month, and top surgery consultations within the next week. He'd probably even organise bottom surgery in a couple of years if Tim wanted it. However that would require the key step of telling Bruce. Ew. That was an unnecessary step. Tim could do this himself. OR Coming out is optional, and Tim decides to pick the option of “let everyone else figure it out by themselves,” so he goes and does his own hrt and top surgery and stuff

entry.summary:

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,544Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 35

entry.title: Kneeling Before Heaven
entry.summary:
Author: DovesNotDead

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,044Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 22

Summary: Jason is not a religious man. Not here, not now, not anymore. He mutters his rosary in the dark, sure, but the words are shaped not by belief but by memory. His prayers are an utterance for a home now long gone, one that might never have existed in the first place. He invokes something he cannot fall back into, something that never held him properly when he pretended it did, something that he once cried out to in the cold winters and harsh nights.But looking at the man in front of him, Jason doesn't understand how he could ever have called himself a nonbeliever.Written for JayTim Week 2026 Day One! Prompts: Bare Skin and Transformation

entry.title: Bradley Chadley
entry.summary:
Author: BlossomingBitch_15

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,400Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 62

Summary: Jason takes a deep, pained breath. “...I want it back, Red.” “I want a chance at us back,” He clarifies quietly, before adding, “I’m sorry.” Tim’s mouth goes dry. He can hear his heartbeat. “I’ve been moving on.” He croaks. Jason’s green eyes pierce into him. “Please don’t.” It’s so unfair. “When you…” Tim tries. He lets context fill what he can’t say, gesturing to the scar on his chest before continuing, “It was all I had left that I hadn’t committed to Robin, the only thing I was holding onto that was silly and frivolous.” Tim’s spiraling, repeating the phrases that fed his empty soul sparingly in his darkest moments, “It only weakened me. Now I’m focused on being the perfect soldier you always hated the idea of. I’ve been more focused with a higher rate of achievement and—” Jason’s in his space, pushing up against him in seconds. The end of his tail smacks into Tim’s, prompting the latter to shiver out of his mental descent. “You’ll never be a perfect soldier.” Jason hisses, “I won’t let you.” AKA: A new criminal turns Tim into a mermaid and Jason comes to the rescue (after years of rejection and skinning Tim's soulmark off)

entry.title: Here just to watch me writhe
entry.summary:
Author: Dragmir

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,680Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 91

Summary: “At least you haven’t had to parade around in these for hours.” Tim kicks one of his feet out petulantly. “In fact…”“What?” Jason asks, dreading the silence and the smug drawl that had taken over Tim’s voice.“You still owe me a favor from that time in the East docks with the mannequin," Tim says. “And I think I’d like to cash it in.”“What?” Jason feels baffled. He remembered his promised ‘favor’, but what on Earth did that have to do with..?“I’d like a foot massage.”“You-?” he sputters. “What?"

entry.title: angelic, ethereal, and incandescent
entry.summary:
Author: EdmundPevensiesQueen

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,055Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 80

Summary: “Ugh!” Tim exclaimed, stepping back from the door. Jason fell forward due to how quickly and unexpectedly the door was able to move freely again. He heard something snap and flap as his knees hit Tim’s carpet. “It’s me, I just got hit with a spell and look ridiculous right now.” Jason looked up, eyes widening as he saw the long, feathered wings that were tucked into themselves behind Tim’s back. Jason’s mouth dropped open, the sunlight streaming in from Tim’s windows backlighting him and causing a halo effect. Ridiculous was hardly the word Jason would reach for to describe Tim’s current state. Angelic and ethereal and incandescent were all significantly more appropriate. Tim crossed his arms, his wings tightening up further behind him, “Do not make fun of me right now. If you-”“How’d this happen?” Jason asked, his voice breathy even in his own ears. He swallowed, his mouth suddenly dry. And how do I thank whoever did this? he thought, but didn’t dare say out loud.  Written For JayTim Week 2026, Day 1: Transformation (with sprinklings of Popsicles and Bare Skin if you squint)

entry.title: The Waddling Ducky
entry.summary:
Author: Inumaru12

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,864Chapters: 1/3Kudos: 127

Summary: Tim Drake is twenty-four when Damian finishes school and is given reign of Wayne Enterprises. Years ago, Tim would have been devastated and hurt by Bruce's choice. But now, he's thrilled because it means he has time to himself and he can finally do what he's always wanted for himself: Have a child.Tim is excited and Bruce seems oddly calm about the whole thing, but nothing can go wrong with that, right?(A comedy of errors and misunderstandings begins)

entry.title: You're gonna go far, kid
entry.summary:
Author: Piratecoreart

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,267Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 93

Summary: (A strange peace seemed to come over Tim, his fear melting, his body relaxing. "Oh," he said, and to Jason's utter shock, he crawled forwarded, dragging his battered body to meet Jason on the ground. He reached, touching Jason's face with a trembling, bloody, tiny hand, and said, "Am I dying, then?") When Jason finds a broken bird, eerily familiar to when his own wings were clipped, what can he do but try and intervene? Or: Tim becomes Jason's sidekick, and the dynamic duo is reborn as Villains

entry.title: “Heron, Whose Ghost Are You?”
entry.summary:
Author: Aaronymous9

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 106,059Chapters: 20/95Kudos: 490

Summary: Tim Drake accidentally creates a baby with his and Kon’s DNA while trying to bring him back from the dead. He decides his best course of action is to fake his death and start a new life as a single father. Or, Typical Timkon Clone Baby AU that tackles themes of queerness, self-discovery, the ethics of fighting crime, and what it means to be a good father.

entry.title: til you don't choose "right"
entry.summary:
Author: alexndr_writes

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,048Chapters: 2/3Kudos: 102

Summary: After years of pining, Kon El and Tim Drake finally shut the hell up and kiss each other. It’s a beautiful, romantic makeout session that leads to them being in a compromising position. Multiple positions, if you want to be historically accurate about the ordeal.Of course in a heat of passion, a lapse in remembering birth control, and the condom breaking… Yeah, these boys were doomed. So, so doomed.After discovering his pregnancy, Tim has to make a decision that will shape his future forever. Kon is completely on board (as a supportive boyfriend should be). But keeping his trans identity, his queer identity, and his mpreg nightmare a secret from his family of detectives? Ha, good luck Tim.OR: Author gets angry about reproductive healthcare being at risk (again) and writes out his nightmare scenario!Title is from the song "How Am I Supposed To Love Myself?" By Beth McCarthy

entry.title: After Years
entry.summary:
Author: Kelly_Shelly

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,696Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 79

Summary: It all started when Jason revived after 35, he woke up from the purest nothingness next to his tombstone."Uhm... what?" Jason slowly wakes up as he slowly gets up. He looks around as the memories of the Joker's torture hit him. Until he remembers, he died. Jason knows what to do, go to Batman, back to Bruce... Or not.

entry.title: Catgirls Can Have A Little Theft, As A Treat
entry.summary:
Author: atomicpanda

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 92,828Chapters: 59/?Kudos: 520

Summary: Waking up as a tween catgirl in the DCU, a self insert into Gotham experiences the thrills of the masked nightlife, fails to combat her new urge to steal, and fails to combat her new feline instincts, all while working towards her goal of bringing good music to a Deathworld. Armed with the power of adorableness and also a deck of cards that hold a unique path to Power, Allison "AlleyKat" Kyle may not shake the world, but she sure as heck is going to knock it off the ledge.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
